scripts.dev: concurrently -n FRONTEND,BACKEND -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.phase1:ready: npx tsc --noEmit -p backend/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p frontend/tsconfig.json && npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run phase1:smoke --workspace backend
